coupon.source_phrase_block: Reserving this pass gives you access to a promo code which can be used for discounted admission. Each promo code provides a discount for: 2 adults at $15 each (general admission & special exhibition) up to 4 children ages 7–17 at $10 each (special exhibition only). There is no discount for children 7–17 for general admission, currently $10. Children age six and younger are free Patrons who reserve tickets in advance online with the promo code will receive an e-mail with their admission ticket(s) attached and need to present their ticket(s) when they arrive at the Museum, preferably on a phone or device, but tickets printed on paper are accepted.
